hero.lead: Every purchase brings us closer to Calestra World — a place where magic, feelings and the future meet. You get products today, and together we build something bigger.

newsletter.consent: I agree to receive emails and accept the Privacy Policy.

story.title: More than a regular webshop.
story.body: The products are clean and clear to sell. The story surrounds them to build the brand.

card1.title: The symbol is always present.
card1.body: You are never alone in the feeling.

card2.title: Carefully selected materials.
card2.body: Built to last and feel better than a fast trend.

card3.title: Produced when needed.
card3.body: Less noise. More responsibility. More control over the first wave.

preorder.firstDropNote: The necklace in the first drop is sold as a collector pre-order. You secure your place now, and the production wave follows after validation.

tools.firstDropBody: Only our six strongest auto-products are shown in this wave. More releases will come later.

shop.previewNote: Some features are still being built. What you see is intentionally launch-ready preview — stable, fast and clear.

black-star-tee.title: First Light – Tee
black-star-tee.description: A black premium T-shirt with The Harmonic Star close to the heart. Discreet, strong and made for everyday life before Calestra opens the world.

black-star-hoodie.title: Bearer of Light – Hoodie
black-star-hoodie.description: A black hoodie with The Harmonic Star as a quiet signal. Warm, urban and made for evenings, journeys and people who carry something more.

black-star-tote.title: Path Carrier – Tote
black-star-tote.description: A black tote bag with The Harmonic Star. Easy to carry, strong enough to be seen and made for the small paths of everyday life.

hidden-signal-mug.title: Hidden Signal Mug™
hidden-signal-mug.subtitle: Heat reveal · Now you see it
hidden-signal-mug.description: A black heat-reveal mug where The Harmonic Star awakens when the drink turns warm. A quiet morning ritual for those who see more than others.

black-star-mug.title: Hidden Signal Mug™
black-star-mug.subtitle: Heat reveal · Now you see it
black-star-mug.description: A black heat-reveal mug where The Harmonic Star awakens when the drink turns warm. A quiet morning ritual for those who see more than others.

calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.title: The Harmonic Star – Necklace
calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.description: Calestra’s wearable symbol. A bright star necklace inspired by what Lyra carries — made for hope, presence and the beginning.
calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.subtitle: Collector pre-order · first wave is being reserved now
calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.preorderText: Reserved now and delivered in a later production wave.
calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.preorderNote: This is a pre-reservation. Production and delivery happen in a later wave when the first batch goes live.
calestra-harmonic-star-necklace.preorderEta: The first production wave will be announced after drop validation.

calestra-harmonic-star-collector-print.title: The Harmonic Star – Collector Print
calestra-harmonic-star-collector-print.description: A collector print with Calestra’s light-bearing symbol. Made for a wall, studio or quiet corner where the beginning should be visible.

about.title: About Calestra World
about.intro: Calestra World is both a store and a long-term creative project — products today help finance a larger experience tomorrow. Our aesthetic blends magic, feelings and the future. The community co-creates through insights, preorders and support products.

leadership.title: Leadership & culture
leadership.body: Calestra is managed by a seasoned team across business development, design and guest experience. Decisions are guided by stewardship, clarity and long-term value. We favour calm, stable delivery over big words.

advisory.title: Advisory circle
advisory.body: A small circle of senior advisors supports leadership with experience in commerce, finance, law, technology and culture. The council helps us balance innovation with stability and responsible growth.

governance.title: Governance
items: Clear responsibilities and documentation per project.
Quarterly reviews tied to roadmap milestones.
Pragmatic risk management and conservative budgeting.

sections.title: How we work
sections.body:
• Small batches, quality materials and transparent communication.
• Digital and physical drops tied to roadmap milestones.
• Surplus is reinvested into development and community activities.

sections.title: Why a store?
sections.body: Real products keep us grounded, fund the build, and let supporters carry a piece of the world with them.

faq.a: We grow with care. When external partners add clear value, we will publish a note on the press page.
Support is operated from Sweden with coverage in Swedish and English.

vision.title: Vision & Values
vision.intro: We build a world where wonder feels practical and the future feels warm.
principles: Care — empathy in how we design and communicate.
Craft — careful attention to materials and detail.
Clarity — simple words and honest timelines.

sections.title: Core values
sections.body: Care, Craft, Clarity. We deliver with empathy, care about the details and communicate simply.

sections.title: Promise to the community
sections.body: Open dev notes, honest timelines and rewards tied to progress.

sections.title: What we avoid
sections.body: Overpromising, throwaway products and attention traps. We prefer lasting value.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.intro: We prefer fewer, better things. Our footprint is small by design and improves as we grow.

sections.title: Materials
sections.body: Organic or recycled where possible. We select durable bases over fast fashion.

sections.title: Packaging
sections.body: Minimal, recyclable and sized to fit the product.

sections.title: Transport
sections.body: Consolidated shipments and local fulfillment partners when viable.

sections.title: Longevity
sections.body: We design for longer use. Care guides are included where relevant.

faq.a: Our first focus is reduction. Offsets may be used for residual emissions after reduction steps.

press.title: Press & Media
press.intro: Logos, images and story angles for journalists and creators.
press.boilerplate: Calestra World blends design, music and interactive storytelling. The store funds the prototype.

sections.title: Boilerplate
sections.body: Calestra World blends design, music and interactive storytelling. The store funds the prototype.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body:
Press inquiries: press@calestra.com
Brand assets available on request.

faq.a: Yes, for editorial use with credit to “Calestra World”. For commercial use — contact us first.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We hire rarely and carefully. If you love small teams and precise delivery, say hello.
list: Speculative applications are welcome — include work samples.
benefits: Clear scope and focus on craft.
Honest feedback loops and calm planning.

sections.title: How to apply
sections.body: Email careers@calestra.com with a short introduction and links to your strongest work.

sections.title: Before you write
sections.body: Order questions? Include your order ID. Press? Use press@calestra.com.

faq.q: Do you have a phone number?
faq.a: We primarily work by email to keep responses accurate and traceable. Phone calls can be scheduled when needed.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Short, readable and human. Local consumer laws apply in addition to these terms.

sections.title: Purchases
sections.body: An order becomes binding once payment has been confirmed. Prices include VAT for EU customers.

sections.title: Delivery
sections.body: We ship from the EU. Estimated delivery windows are shown at checkout.

sections.title: Right of withdrawal
sections.body: Made to order • Safe guarantee for defects. See Returns for details.

sections.title: Liability
sections.body: We are not liable for indirect losses. Your statutory rights are not affected.

sections.title: Misprints & availability
sections.body: If an obvious error occurs in price or stock, we may cancel the order with a full refund.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We collect the minimum data required to run the store and keep your account secure.

sections.title: What we collect
sections.body: Contact details, order data and basic analytics. No sensitive categories.

sections.title: Why
sections.body: To process orders, prevent fraud and improve the site.

sections.title: Storage & security
sections.body: Data is stored in the EU when possible. Payments are processed by PCI-certified providers.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Access, correction and deletion. Email privacy@calestra.com.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.intro: Cookies keep the cart working and help us understand usage.

sections.title: Essential
sections.body: Session and cart cookies — required for the site to function.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.body: Anonymous usage metrics. You can opt out in the cookie banner.

sections.title: Marketing
sections.body: Only if you actively consent.

manage.title: Manage preferences
manage.body: Open the cookie icon in the footer to update your choices at any time.

faq.q: How can I change my choice?
faq.a: Open the cookie banner from the footer icon and update your preferences.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.intro: We ship within the EU and selected regions. Global shipping is on the way.
regions: Additional regions will be announced over time.

sections.title: Rates & free shipping
sections.body: Live rates at checkout. Free shipping threshold depends on country and currency.

sections.title: Handling time
sections.body: Orders usually ship within 1–3 business days.

sections.title: Tracking
sections.body: A tracking link is emailed once your order leaves the warehouse.

faq.q: Can I change my address after ordering?
faq.a: Contact support quickly — we can adjust it if the package has not left the warehouse.
International buyers may be charged import fees by local authorities.

returns.title: Returns & Right of Withdrawal
returns.intro: Made to order • Safe guarantee for defects.

sections.title: Conditions
sections.body: Items must be unused, with tags and in original condition. Hygiene items are sealed.

sections.title: How to return
sections.body: Email support@calestra.com with your order ID to receive a return label and instructions.

sections.title: Refunds
sections.body: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–10 days after approved inspection.

faq.q: What should I do if the product is faulty?
faq.a: Contact support with your order ID and photos so we can help with a replacement or refund.

billing.title: Billing
billing.intro: We accept most payment cards and popular regional methods.

sections.title: Payment methods
sections.body: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Klarna (where supported), Swish (SE).

sections.title: Receipts & invoices
sections.body: Order confirmations are emailed automatically. Company invoices can be arranged when needed.

sections.title: Taxes & VAT
sections.body: Displayed prices include VAT for EU customers. International buyers may be charged import fees by local authorities.
